eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Georgia; at 08:59 PM ON MAR 4, 2026 Effective until 02:59 AM MAR 5, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS TEST. We interrupt this program to bring you this important announcement. This is an emergency missing child alert, or Levis Call, the Georgia version of an Amber Alert. The COBB COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AGENCY and the GEORGIA BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION are looking for a 2019 SILVER CHEVROLET SILVERADO, with GEORGIA TAG, ABC123. On JANUARY 18, 2025, John Doe, a 3 YEAR OLD, WHITE MALE with BLOND HAIR and GREEN EYES, was last seen wearing a Blue pants, White Spiderman shirt. He or she was abducted by James Doe, a 36 year old white male 54 tall weighing 150 pounds with blond hair and hazel eye color and was last seen wearing Yellow pants and blue T-shirt. They were last seen at LOCATION, going North on I-39 DIRECTION OF TRAVEL. John Doe is believed to be in extreme danger. If you have any information on the whereabouts of John Doe or the 2019 SILVER CHEVROLET SILVERADO, with GEORGIA TAG, ABC123, please dial 911. The public can also provide information to the GBI tip line at 1-800-597-TIPS or the See Send app for smartphone users. THIS IS A TEST
